hooks.command: test -z "$SOPRANO_BIN" || "$SOPRANO_BIN" agent-event ready --profile claude-code --title "Claude Code" --body "Ready for a prompt"
test -z "$SOPRANO_BIN" || "$SOPRANO_BIN" agent-event needs-input --profile claude-code --notify --title "Claude Code" --body "Response ready"
test -z "$SOPRANO_BIN" || "$SOPRANO_BIN" agent-event needs-input --profile claude-code --notify --title "Claude Code" --body "Approval or input required"
